title: Agent OS ROI review: environment and session state view
goal: Capture the ROI case for a compact environment and session state view.
Keep durable repo guidance separate from ephemeral local session facts.
scope: Issue #1115 ROI point 5: environment and session state view.
Runtime constraints, cache guidance, ports/dev servers, env vars, recent command failures, and recovery paths.
non_goals: Do not add local session state files in this review.
Do not make ephemeral state part of planning or memory.

review_mode.review question: Would a compact workbench view reduce environment rediscovery and recovery cost?
review_mode.inputs inspected first: Issue #1115 body, startup uv cache guidance, prior command failure output

review_method.commands used: uv run agentic-workspace start --task "Create one planning review artifact for each of the ten agent OS capability ROI points from issue #1115" --format json; make maintainer-surfaces
review_method.evidence sources: GitHub #1115; startup uv_cache_guidance; maintainer-surfaces failure log path and remediation command

findings.title: Environment and session state is underweighted for ordinary agent throughput
findings.summary: Startup already exposes some environment guidance, such as repo-local uv cache advice, and failed commands produce log paths and remediation commands. A single compact workbench view would make those signals easier to consume without converting ephemeral state into durable planning.
findings.evidence: The startup payload included `uv_cache_guidance` with a repo-local cache recommendation. The earlier maintainer proof failure reported a full log path and exact `make render-schema-reference` remediation. Issue #1115 identifies runtime constraints, recent failures, ports, servers, env vars, and recovery paths as high ROI.
findings.risk if unchanged: Agents repeatedly rediscover environment constraints, lose useful recent failure context, or put transient workbench details into durable planning or memory surfaces.
findings.suggested action: Create a child slice for a Workspace-composed environment/session view that separates checked-in recovery guidance from local/generated ephemeral facts.
findings.promotion target: GitHub child issue under #1115; Workspace Composition plus Environment / Recovery Guidance
findings.promotion trigger: Promote when environment friction repeats, when dev-server/browser workflows become common, or when command-failure recovery context is repeatedly reconstructed.
findings.post-remediation note shape: stub pointing to the workbench-view owner and local-state policy

recommendation.promote: Good follow-on after task/proof/generated-surface slices, or earlier if environment friction becomes dominant.
recommendation.defer: Keep inactive until repeated environment rediscovery or explicit maintainer priority.
recommendation.dismiss: Do not dismiss; preserve as a parent-lane review signal.

retention.trigger: A child issue defines the durable-versus-ephemeral environment view boundary.
retention.proof surface: Workspace report/start output and doctor/recovery command evidence.

validation_commands: uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
drift_log: 2026-05-24: Review record created from issue #1115 ROI point 5.
